<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Bayaan!

  Please fill out the sections below. If a section does not apply, write "N/A"
  rather than removing it — reviewers use a consistent template to triage PRs.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short summary of the change and why it is needed. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply by replacing [ ] with [x]. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore (dependencies, tooling, CI)
- [ ] Breaking change

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change? Manual steps, new tests, screenshots, etc. -->

- [ ] Verified on desktop (Chrome / Safari / Firefox)
- [ ] Verified on mobile viewport
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests (`npm test`)
- [ ] Added or updated e2e tests (`npm run test:e2e`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `npx prettier --write` on all changed files
- [ ] Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` — no new type errors
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` — no new warnings
- [ ] Branch targets `main` (we use trunk-based development)
- [ ] No stray `console.log` or commented-out blocks
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] If this touches scholarly content (translations, tafaseer, reciters), sources are linked and permissioned per [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md)
- [ ] AI assistance used? If yes, the generated blocks are reviewed line-by-line and marked with `// @ai` where non-trivial

## Screenshots or recordings

<!-- For any user-visible change, attach before/after screenshots or a short
     screen recording. Include both desktop and mobile viewports where relevant. -->
